packageName: Ha Noi - Da Nang - Phu Quoc with Over Night Cruise
summaryItinerary: Day 1 (6th June): Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour (No meal)
Day 2 (7th June): Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay Overnight Cruise (Local Lunch + Local Dinner)
Day 3 (8th June): Ha Long back to Ha Noi – Ha Noi Departure – Da Nang Arrival – Free Leisure (Breakfast + Local Brunch)
Day 4 (9th June): Da Nang – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Coconut Forest – Hoi An Ancient Town (No meal)
Day 5 (10th June): Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge (No meal)
Day 6 (11th June): Da Nang Departure – Phu Quoc Arrival – Private Afternoon Tour to Grand World without Guide (No meal)
Day 7 (12th June): Phu Quoc – Private Day Tour to Vinpearl Safari – VinWonder without Guide (No meal)
Day 8 (13th June): Phu Quoc – Join Group Day Tour to 4 Islands by Boat – Hon Thom Cable Car (No meal)
Day 9 (14th June): Phu Quoc Departure (No meal)

detailedItinerary.day: Day 1: Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour (No meal)
details: Arrive in Ha Noi, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
13:30: Visit Tran Quoc Pagoda located on Golden Fish Island in West Lake. It is the oldest pagoda in Hanoi built in the 6th century.

14:30: Continue to visit Temple of Literature – the first university of Vietnam, The Temple of Literature (Van Mieu Quoc Tu Giam) is one of the most attractive tourist spots in Northern Vietnam. The Temple of Literature was founded in 1070.

15:30: Keep going to visit Hoa Lo Prison, the prison was built by the French, from 1886 to 1901, when Vietnam was still a part of French Indochina. The French called the prison Maison Centrale. The prison was called “A Hell on Earth” and now the prison is like a war museum for those who want to understand more about the war against France of Vietnamese people.
16:30: Our bus will take you back to the hotel for check-in.
Free leisure and overnight in Ha Noi City

detailedItinerary.day: Day 2: Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay with 01 Night in Cruise (Lunch + Dinner)
detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay with 01 Night in Cruise (Lunch + Dinner)
details: Do hotel check-out
08:00: Pick up from Hotel in Hanoi Old Quarter or Opera Theatre House and departing for Halong
11:30 – 12:00: Arrive at Tuan Chau harbor, check in at the waiting room.
12:00 – 12:30: Get on Tender Boat to Verdure Lotus Cruise and enjoy Welcome drink, meet the captain, crew to get a brief introduction about cruise and safety guidelines. Complete check-in procedure.
13:00 – 13:15: Enjoy Vietnamese seafood and vegetarian lunch, while cruising in the magnificent Halong – Lan Ha Bay, admiring the fascinating rock formations in the bay.
15:00–15:30: You can choose to relax on the sundesk or explore Ba Trai Dao – Tra Bau area and the natural lagoon of Lan Ha Bay.
17:30 –18:30: Come back to our Cruise and participate in our Happy Our & Cooking Class. Take photos and relax.
19:00: Dinner is served at the restaurant. After dinner, you can join the squid fishing program, relax on the sundesk…Overnight on boat.

detailedItinerary.day: Day 3: Ha Long back to Ha Noi – Ha Noi Departure – Da Nang Evening Arrival – Free leisure (Breakfast + Brunch)
detailedItinerary.title: Ha Long back to Ha Noi – Ha Noi Departure – Da Nang Evening Arrival – Free leisure (Breakfast + Brunch)
details: 6:00-6:30: Taichi on the sundeck, sightseeing sunrise
6:15 -7:00: Have breakfast. Morning view of bay’s landscape with a cup of tea or coffee.
7:00: Visitors Dark and Light Cave. Here you can bamboo Boat to explore the landscape, or immerse yourself. in the cool, clear blue water of this place.
9:30: Back to your cabin, take relax and check carefully all the luggage before leaving your cabin.

10:00: Check-out from the private cabin and enjoy a fantastic cruise on the bay for room service. Complete check-out procedure. Enjoy lunch at the restaurant while the cruise is returning to the harbour.
11:00: You take the Tender boat back to Tuan Chau port.
Arrival at Tuan Chau Marina. Our bus will take you back to hotel in Ha Noi
Our driver will take you to the Noi Bai International Airport as your departure flight to Da Nang City
Arrive in Da Nang City, our driver will take you to hotel for check-in
Free leisure and overnight in Da Nang City

detailedItinerary.day: Day 4: Da Nang - Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Coconut Forest – Hoi An Ancient Town (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang - Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Coconut Forest – Hoi An Ancient Town (No meal)
details: Free leisure in the morning
14:00: Our Tour Guide and Driver will pick you up at your hotel in the city center and start Marble Mountains, Bay Mau Coconut Forest & Hoi An Acient Town Tour.

Marble Mountain is a complex consisting of Kim (Iron Mountain), Mộc (Wood Mountain), Thủy (Water Mountain), Hỏa (Fire Mountain), Thổ (Earth Mountain) symbolizing for 5 main elements of the universe in Asia Culture. You will discover the mysterious beauty of caves combining the sacred atmosphere of Buddhism. Visiting Tam Thai Pagoda, Linh Ung Pagoda.
You will admire the masterpieces of exquisite stone sculptures created by the skilful hands of artisans in Non Nuoc village at the foot of the mountain.
16:00: We continue our trip to visit Bay Mau Coconut Forest Tour, you will be explored in Bay Mau coconut forest space by traditional basket boats.
17:30: Departure to visit Hoi An Ancient Town
18:00: Take a short break

Visit Hoi An Acient town, with Japanese Bridge. This only remain of Japanses culture is now considered as a symbol of Hoi An. Taking a walk on the street along the Hoai River, enjoy the night life of Hoi An Town.
21:00 – 21:30: Car and tour guide will take you back to the hotel.
Overnight in Da Nang City

detailedItinerary.day: Day 5: Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge (No meal)
details: 07:30 - 08:30: Our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel, depart for Ba Na Hill through one of the most beautiful seaside streets of Central Vietnam.

09:00: Arrive in Ba Na, you will have a chance to experience the two – UNESCO - record cable system up to the top of the hill and enjoy the beautiful sight of Mo stream, Toc Tien waterfall with the impressive dazzling white spume.
Sightseeing on Ba Na Hill to:
Hand of the gods hold Vietnam’s Golden Bridge.
L’Jardin Zone with French Architecture Building: Tinh Tâm Garden, French Stable, one hundred-year-old pomelo tree, Old Villas.
Linh Ung Pagoda, 27 meters Buddha Statue, Loc Uyen Garden.
11:30: From Debay station, you will get on the second cable system to move to Nui Chua Peak – the rooftop of Da nang City.
Continue the tour with Fantasy Park – one of the most modern indoor game centers of the Asia.
Visit Chua Linh Tu Temple, enjoy a panoramic view of the whole Da Nang city and Da Nang Bay through the mist in a romantic afternoon on Ba Na peak.
Go down by the cable system. Get on coach and return the city centre.
17:00 -17:30: Drop off at your hotel.
Free leisure and overnight in Da Nang City

detailedItinerary.day: Day 6: Da Nang Departure – Phu Quoc Arrival – Private Afternoon Tour to Grand World without Guide (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang Departure – Phu Quoc Arrival – Private Afternoon Tour to Grand World without Guide (No meal)
details: Do hotel check-out before 12:00 PM
Our driver will take you directly to the Da Nang International Airport as your departure flight to Phu Quoc City
Arrive in Phu Quoc City, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
Do hotel check-in at 15:00 PM
15:30: Our driver will pick you up at the hotel and embark on a private afternoon tour to Grand World, a vibrant entertainment complex known as the "Sleepless City."

Explore the various attractions at Grand World, including cultural shows, shopping streets, and unique architectural structures. The complex offers a blend of traditional and modern experiences, providing a lively atmosphere for visitors.
20:00: Our driver will take you back to hotel for relax
Free leisure and overnight in Phu Quoc

detailedItinerary.day: Day 7: Phu Quoc – Private Day Tour to Vinpearl Safari – VinWonder without Guide (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Phu Quoc – Private Day Tour to Vinpearl Safari – VinWonder without Guide (No meal)
details: 8:30: Our driver will pick you up at the hotel and your private tour begins with a visit to Vinpearl Safari, Vietnam's first and only open zoo. Covering a vast area, the safari is home to a wide variety of wildlife from around the world, including endangered species. Enjoy a tour through the safari, where you can see animals in their natural habitats and learn about conservation efforts.

Head to VinWonders, a world-class amusement park. VinWonders offers a range of activities, including thrilling rides, water slides, and themed zones that cater to all ages. Spend the afternoon experiencing the excitement and fun of this extensive amusement park.
19:00: Our driver will take you back to hotel for relax
Free leisure and overnight in Phu Quoc

detailedItinerary.day: Day 8: Phu Quoc – Join Group Day Tour to 4 Islands by Boat – Hon Thom Cable Car (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Phu Quoc – Join Group Day Tour to 4 Islands by Boat – Hon Thom Cable Car (No meal)
details: 08:00 – 08:30: Pick up from your hotel in Duong Dong ward. Visit the Pearl Farm (approx. 30 minutes).
09:40 – 09:50: Arrive at An Thoi Harbor, board the speedboat.
Visit Coral Park – Sea Walker Experience (Optional activity - Pay by yourself): Walk under the sea and admire colorful marine life.
Stop at Mong Tay Island: Take photos with SUP boards and Flycam.
Continue to Gam Ghi/Buom Island: Go swimming and snorkeling at the coral reef.
Visit May Rut Island: Free time for swimming and relaxing.

includes: Roundtrip airport transfer by private 7-seat car without guide
Roundtrip transport Ha Noi - Ha Long by Shuttle Bus without guide
Meals mentioned in Itinerary: 1 Breakfast + 1 Lunch + 1 Dinner + 1 Brunch
01 night accommodation at standard cabin in Ha Long Bay cruise
Grand World Entrance Ticket: Gondola Boating
Water in tours: 1 bottle of 500ml/person/day tour
Tours and Transfer are on Sharing Basic with good condition coach and local guide speaking English on Day 1, 4, 5, and Day 8
Tours and Transfer are on Private Basic with good condition 7-seat car without Guide on Day 6, and Day 7
excludes: 07 nights accommodation at standard room in hotel with daily breakfast
Accommodation in Ha Noi, Da Nang, and Phu Quoc
Surcharge for transportation and SIC Tours if hotel is not located Ha Noi Old Quarter, Da Nang City – Beach Center, Duong Dong Town in Phu Quoc
Wax Museum, Debay Wine Cellar, Alpine Coaster, 10D Cinema, Climbing games, and prize-winning games with coin in Ba Na Hills
Drink on Cruise, during Meals and Surcharge for Beverages brought on Cruise
Grand World Entrance Ticket: Teddy Bear Museum – The Quintessence Vietnam Show
Electric Car (Zoo Tram Bus – Buggy) in Vinpearl Safari – VinWonder – Grand World
Other meals and services than mentioned
Laundry, telephone calls and expenditure of a personal nature
Early check-in and late check-out at all hotels
Unforeseen expenses in the event of tour cancellation due to force majeure situations such as natural disasters, adverse weather conditions, or strikes...

Surcharge for peak season: Hung Kings' Festival (26th April, 2026), Vietnam's Reunification Day and International Labor Day Holidays (30th April - 01st May, 2026), Independence Day (01st – 02nd Sep, 2026), Christmas Holidays (24th– 25th Dec, 2026), Da Nang's International Firework Festival 2026 (29 – 30 May, 05 – 06 Jun, 12 – 13 Jun, 19 – 20 Jun, 26 – 27 Jun, 10 - 11 July, 2026)
notes: Hotels are subject to availability. Check-in time: 14:00 PM and Check-out time: 12:00 PM
Flight fares are subject to change
Note: All bank fee will be on customer’s own
Note: Itinerary is subject to change depending on weather conditions.
15:20: Arrive at Thom Island: Enjoy the thrilling Aquatopia Water Park, then return via the scenic cable car ride (~25 minutes).
Our driver will take you directly to the Phu Quoc International Airport as your departure flight
Thank you for booking with us!
